CustomField.description: The expiration date of the ssl certificate will be tracked automatically for server type BrandMaker and Magnolia. Set manually for other server types. The responsible TC will receive an e-mail notification 30 days prior expiration date.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The expiration date of the ssl certificate will be tracked automatically for server type BrandMaker and Magnolia. Set manually for other server types. The responsible TC will receive an e-mail notification 30 days prior expiration date.
CustomField.label: SSL Expiration Date
